label: Trust in federal government
question_text: How often can you trust the federal government in Washington to do what is right? Always, most of the time, about half the time, some of the time, or never?

label: Government run by big interests or for all
question_text: Would you say the government is pretty much run by a few big interests looking out for themselves or that it is run for the benefit of all the people?

response_options.1: Run by a few big interests
response_options.2: For the benefit of all the people

label: Government waste of tax money
question_text: Do you think that people in government waste a lot of the money we pay in taxes, waste some of it, or don't waste very much of it?

label: External efficacy: people like me have no say
question_text: How much do you agree or disagree with the following statement: 'People like me don't have any say about what the government does.' Do you agree strongly, agree somewhat, neither agree nor disagree, disagree somewhat, or disagree strongly?

label: External efficacy: public officials don't care
question_text: How much do you agree or disagree with the following statement: 'Public officials don't care much what people like me think.' Do you agree strongly, agree somewhat, neither agree nor disagree, disagree somewhat, or disagree strongly?

label: National economy retrospective
question_text: Would you say that over the past year the nation's economy has gotten better, stayed about the same, or gotten worse?

label: Personal finances retrospective
question_text: Would you say that you and your family are better off or worse off financially than you were a year ago?

label: Government spending and services
question_text: Some people think the government should provide fewer services, even in areas such as health and education, in order to reduce spending. Other people feel it is important for the government to provide more services even if it means an increase in spending. Which view is closer to yours?

response_options.1: Government should provide fewer services and reduce spending
response_options.2: Government should provide more services and increase spending

label: Affordable Care Act favor/oppose
question_text: Do you favor, oppose, or neither favor nor oppose the health care reform law passed in 2010, also known as the Affordable Care Act or Obamacare? And would you say you favor/oppose it a great deal or somewhat?

label: Government vs private health insurance
question_text: There is much concern about the rapid rise in medical and hospital costs. Some feel there should be a government insurance plan which would cover all medical and hospital expenses. Others feel that medical expenses should be paid by individuals through private insurance plans. Which view is closer to yours?

label: Immigration level preference
question_text: Do you think the number of immigrants from foreign countries who are permitted to come to the United States to live should be increased a great deal, increased a moderate amount, increased a little, kept about the same as it is now, decreased a little, decreased a moderate amount, or decreased a great deal?

label: Racial resentment: slavery and discrimination legacy
question_text: Do you agree strongly, agree somewhat, neither agree nor disagree, disagree somewhat, or disagree strongly with this statement: 'Generations of slavery and discrimination have created conditions that make it difficult for Blacks to work their way out of the lower class.'

label: Racial resentment: Blacks should try harder
question_text: Do you agree strongly, agree somewhat, neither agree nor disagree, disagree somewhat, or disagree strongly with this statement: 'If Blacks would only try harder, they could be just as well off as whites.'

label: Government aid to Blacks
question_text: Some people feel that the government in Washington should make every effort to improve the social and economic position of Blacks. Others feel that the government should not make any special effort to help Blacks because they should help themselves. Where would you place yourself on this scale? 1 means the government should help Blacks, 7 means Blacks should help themselves.

label: Amount of discrimination against Blacks
question_text: How much discrimination is there in the United States today against each of the following groups? Blacks. Would you say a great deal, a lot, a moderate amount, a little, or none at all?

label: Newer lifestyles contributing to breakdown
question_text: Please tell me how much you agree or disagree: 'The newer lifestyles are contributing to the breakdown of our society.' Use a 7-point scale where 1 means you agree strongly and 7 means you disagree strongly.

response_options.1: Agree strongly that newer lifestyles are contributing to breakdown

anes_010.label: Agree strongly that newer lifestyles are contributing to breakdown

anes_026.label: Agree strongly that newer lifestyles are contributing to breakdown

anes_039.label: Agree strongly that newer lifestyles are contributing to breakdown

anes_041.label: Agree strongly that newer lifestyles are contributing to breakdown

label: Same-sex marriage
question_text: Which comes closest to your view on same-sex couples? Use a 7-point scale where 1 means there should be no legal recognition, 4 means civil unions but not marriage, and 7 means same-sex couples should be allowed to marry.

label: Death penalty
question_text: Do you favor or oppose the death penalty for persons convicted of murder? Use a 7-point scale where 1 means you favor strongly and 7 means you oppose strongly.

label: Gun access
question_text: Do you think the federal government should make it more difficult for people to buy a gun, easier, or keep the rules about the same? Use a 7-point scale where 1 means a lot easier, 4 means kept about the same, and 7 means a lot more difficult.

label: Abortion policy
question_text: Which one of the opinions on this page best agrees with your view about abortion? Use a 7-point scale where 1 means by law abortion should never be permitted and 7 means by law a woman should always be able to obtain an abortion as a matter of personal choice.

label: Environmental regulation
question_text: Do you favor or oppose the U.S. government regulating greenhouse gas emissions from power plants, factories, and cars in an effort to reduce global warming?
